coverage_contract.problem_pattern: Multimodal quantitative reasoning requiring extraction of nutritional/textual data from images followed by demographic-specific mathematical constraints.
supported_variations: Nutritional label extraction for specific daily value calculations
Menu/receipt item counting with subsequent unit conversion
Health guideline mapping based on visual evidence and user profile
unsupported_variations: Abstract medical diagnosis from visual symptoms
Real-time dynamic video tracking of food consumption
forbidden_case_specific_assumptions: Do not assume fixed USDA/WHO threshold values
Do not hardcode specific fruit or food item names
Do not assume static image coordinates for nutritional labels
coverage_contract.why_this_should_generalize: The logic for mapping visual data to external health standards is a symbolic reasoning task that benefits from a structured skill rather than a rigid tool, allowing for flexible integration of OCR results with varying demographic logic.

coverage_contract.problem_pattern: Visual question answering requiring high-resolution inspection of localized text or fine-grained attributes (mood, logos, team names) that are illegible in global views.
supported_variations: Identification of entities via small-scale text/logos
Attribute description of specific small objects (e.g., facial expressions on eggs)
Counting small objects requiring zoomed verification
unsupported_variations: Global scene classification without local dependencies
Abstract reasoning not grounded in visible visual evidence
forbidden_case_specific_assumptions: Do not assume specific team names or sports types
Do not hardcode bounding boxes for specific image IDs
Do not assume a fixed number of objects to count
coverage_contract.why_this_should_generalize: A localized zoom tool addresses the recurring failure where the model attempts to answer based on low-resolution global features; providing a crop-and-inspect primitive allows the agent to resolve fine-grained details across any perception task.

coverage_contract.problem_pattern: Identification of specific entities (teams, events, participants) in complex visual scenes where critical identifying information is contained in small-scale text or logos.
forbidden_case_specific_assumptions: do not assume specific sports like soccer or basketball
do not hardcode specific team names or jersey colors
do not assume text is always at the top or bottom of the frame
coverage_contract.why_this_should_generalize: A localized text zoom tool addresses the recurring failure where standard OCR or global descriptions miss small, high-entropy identifiers like team names on jerseys or banners.
